plugins.name: audit-context
plugins.description: Trail of Bits audit-context toolkit: line-by-line architectural context building for security audits (audit-context-building skill, function-analyzer agent, /audit-context command).

plugins.name: differential-review
plugins.description: Trail of Bits differential review: security-focused review of recent changes/diffs (differential-review skill, /diff-review command).

plugins.name: insecure-defaults
plugins.description: Trail of Bits insecure-defaults detection: find dangerous default configurations and settings.

plugins.name: sharp-edges
plugins.description: Trail of Bits sharp-edges analysis: find API footguns and error-prone constructs.

plugins.name: static-analysis
plugins.description: Trail of Bits static analysis toolkit: Semgrep and CodeQL scanning plus SARIF parsing (semgrep, codeql, sarif-parsing skills; semgrep-scanner agent).

plugins.name: supply-chain
plugins.description: Trail of Bits supply-chain risk auditing: dependency and third-party package risk analysis.

plugins.name: variant-analysis
plugins.description: Trail of Bits variant analysis: find variants of known vulnerabilities across a codebase (/variants command).
